_readme: ADR-0030 reconciliation fixture. Fill this from a REAL consignment file (a genuine EUR.1, phytosanitary certificate, VGM, ONCC quality cert). Put the ACTUAL values as they appear on the paper into each document's 'expected'. Then run: node scripts/reconcile-consignment.mjs docs/delivery/<your-file>.json . It builds the equivalent consignment in Wouri, resolves each document, and reports every field where Wouri's output drifts from the real paper. The values below are a realistic placeholder (Cameroon cocoa to Germany) and are expected to surface drift, which is the point: it shows where Wouri's bindings need to match reality (commodity description, HS subheading, place-of-origin format). No em-dashes.
